title: 迷惑、かけていいなんて

text_block_list.text: On my day off, I decide to take a stroll through town.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Urrrgh...

And along the way, I happen across a very familiar figure, shaking in
an equally familiar way. Could she be crying?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wah! I-I'm sorry for loitering! I'll move along right—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait... Trainer? Ahhh, thank goodness it's just you! H-hello!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I, ummm... I came out to buy some clothes, but... All these stores are
so stylish... Am I really allowed to just walk in?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no, of course not! Someone like me could never wear such pretty
things! Th-the only thing that suits me is that plastic bag over there!
I'll just wear that!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! B-but I need new clothes... All my others got destroyed...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I was going through my clothes to see what I don't wear anymore...
and before I knew it, all my clothes were torn to shreds...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-it's my fault, really... I shouldn't have had the window open...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I was just trying to bring some fresh air into the room! I never
expected my blouses and skirts to... to... Ooohhh...

I... don't think I need to know any more. In summary, it sounds like
Doto needs new clothes, but she's too scared to enter the shops
alone.
choice_data_list: In that case, why don't I join you?
In that case, why don't I join you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No way!
A little harsh, but at least she told it to me straight...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait! I-i-it's not that I don't want to go shopping with you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: It's just... N-never mind! I'm fine! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll just wear plastic bags for the rest of my liiiife!

She dashes off, but thanks to her long skirt, she can't run as fast as
usual. I might actually be able to catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... Wh-why?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Why are you following me?!
Finally, we reach the end of our chase...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Wh-why do you keep chasing me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! I-I'm sorry! I really am!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but I don't want to bother you! I mean, today's supposed to be your
day off!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-and if I take up your time even on your day off... That would make
me the worst of the worst!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You already have to deal with me and my blunders on an almost daily
basis...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to tire you out any more than I already do... You need a
break... away from me...

Setting aside the self-deprecating way she expresses it, Meisho Doto
is clearly trying to be considerate.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was running away... But then you had to go and chase
after me! I'm telling you, I'll cause you trouble!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Y-you do?! Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait... Is this... Trainer... Are you... into that sort of thing?

I explain that, as her trainer, it's only natural that she takes up a lot of
my time. In fact, I want her to trust me—to lean on me more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-uh... If I were to l-l-lean on you... I'd probably crush you...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The minute we lock arms, I'd probably trip and drag you down with
me... Oooh, there'd be bits and pieces everywhere...
choice_data_list: But as long as I get back up, it's fine, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: Don't worry so much. Just trust me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I... Um... Thank you?
She seems a bit confused, but at least now she knows that she can ask me for help when needed. It's up to her whether she takes me up on that or not.
choice_data_list: Now then... Let's get you some clothes!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah... R-right!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... Then, uh... shall we?

The perpetually perplexed Meisho Doto and I make our way back to
the streets, ready to shop...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... We're closed for today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Already?! W-we would've made it in time if I hadn't run away... I'm
sorry...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-maybe I really am... destined to wear plastic bags...

I comfort the crestfallen Meisho Doto. Perhaps someday, she'll ask me
for help of her own will, but until then, I'll just have to keep offering...
